description: Horizontal ICE memorial 'Wall of Honor' card. The background is a soft-focus dark teal and blue texture. At upper left, white serif typography reads 'Wall of Honor' (with 'of' in italic script), next to the gold-and-blue ICE badge emblem (bearing 'ICE' and a small DHS-style seal wrapped in a blue ribbon). Centered is a framed portrait photograph of a mustached man in a dark suit, white shirt, and dark tie against a blue studio backdrop. To the left of the portrait, white text reads 'Senior Special Agent / Claude Arthur Medearis', then a gold divider line, 'End of Watch' (with 'of' italicized), another divider, and the date 'Wednesday, April 19, 1995'. The right third of the image shows a draped American flag above a bouquet of deep-red roses. The tweet text states the agent was killed in the 1995 Oklahoma City Murrah Federal Building bombing and includes the phrase 'continued resolve to ensure public safety and national security'.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Senior Special Agent Claude Arthur Medearis; End of Watch; Wednesday, April 19, 1995
